results.rendered_html: saudāsa m. (fr. su-dās and su-dāsa) N. of various kings (esp. of a son of king Su-dāsa, of the solar race, descendant of Ikṣvāku and Sagara in the thirteenth generation, and also called Mitra-saha and Kalmāṣa-pāda),  TS. ;  MBh.  &c.
